ogTitle: Tetoora Road vs Thalia: Climate Safety

heading: Tetoora Road vs Thalia — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tetoora Road, Victoria and Thalia, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Thalia has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Tetoora Road (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tetoora Road or Thalia safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tetoora Road has a flood risk score of 59/100, while Thalia scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tetoora Road scores 47/100 for bushfire risk. Thalia scores 18/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tetoora Road or Thalia?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Thalia has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.08% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
